title: “For those who believe in flying saucers, this is definitely one …” – FAB Pilot. [1985]

text_preview:
NOV 30th, 1985. Time: 22:00. Duration: not determined. On November 30, 1985, at 10 pm, the Brazilian Air Force FAB 1876 plane near Belo Horizonte, State of Minas Gerais, reported seeing a UFO that he tried to photograph. The unidentified flying object that was not detected by the radar, in the pilot’s description, “was on the BHZ [Belo Horizonte-MG] radial 090” and appeared to be composed of “2 blue lights and one more red light” that carried out vertical and lateral displacements “.

## Transcription: communication between FAB 1876 and ACC-BH.

[23:56:40Z] APP – Air Force 1876, control.

1876
summary: On Nov 30, 1985, FAB 1876 pilot near Belo Horizonte observed and attempted to photograph a multi-light UFO not detected by radar, orbiting within ~4NM of the aircraft.
